message:
fix(sync): exclude external dependencies from orphan cleanup

The orphan cleanup for dependencies.depends_on_id was deleting all
rows where depends_on_id did not exist in the local issues table.
External dependencies (prefixed with 'external:') intentionally
reference IDs outside the local DB, so they were being silently
destroyed on every import — breaking cross-project dependency
tracking and the `ready` command's external blocker filtering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
